DP.264.0000:
Boss: ...I see. You must be the
Trainer I’ve been hearing about.\f
The foolhardy one that’s trying to
stand up to Team Galactic.\f
Although I’d hardly expected to
see that the Trainer is a mere child.\f
I’d heard that our Commanders had
a rough time with you...\f
DP.264.0001:
I know why you’re here, I can sense
it in you.\f
It’s about UXIE, MESPRIT, and AZELF,
correct? You want to save them...\f
I no longer have any need for them.
I am finished with them.\f
If your heart aches to save them,
go right ahead, I could care less.\f
It will save me the trouble of
disposing of them.\f
But, I must say...
You are a remarkable specimen.\f
Those Pokémon have nothing to do
with you, do they not?\f
But still you came to rescue them
out of pity?\f
Such pitifully useless emotions...
It’s illogical and irrational.\f
Pity and compassion are products of
the weak and lacking human heart.\f
You were compelled to come here by
such vacuous sentimentality!\f
I will make you regret paying
heed to your heart!\f
DP.264.0002:
Boss: I see.
You are indeed strong.\f
And the basis of your power is your
compassion toward Pokémon.\f
...How wasteful...
Such emotions are but mere illusions.\f
And, like all illusions, they fade
over time until death banishes them\r
forever.\f
That is why I have abandoned all
emotions as useless sentimentality.\f
...But that doesn’t matter. I doubt
you will ever understand my position.\f
That said, I recognize that you are
strong and courageous to come alone.\f
This is your reward.\f
DP.264.0003:
Boss: The Master Ball is the ultimate
Poké Ball.\f
It will unfailingly catch any Pokémon
in the wild.\f
But it is not anything that I require.\f
Unlike you Trainers, I do not make
Pokémon my friends or partners.\f
Unlike other Team Galactic members,
I don’t use Pokémon as tools.\f
Instead, I make the power of Pokémon
my own.\f
DP.264.0004:
If you wish to save the Pokémon from
the lakes, take the warp panel ahead.\f
I am off to Mt. Coronet.\f
That’s correct. Mt. Coronet.
Where you and I first met.\f
I will ascend the mountain to its
peak and put an end to everything...\f
No. I will bring about a new beginning
for everything...\f
DP.264.0005:
The door is locked.
A special key is needed.
DP.264.0006:
The door is locked.
A special key is needed.\f
Use the Galactic Key?
DP.264.0008:
Team Galactic Warp Panels!\f
The green warp panel returns you
to the ground floor.\f
Onward to a new universe!
-Team Galactic
DP.264.0010: Which report would you like to read?
DP.264.0011:
Some say the universe originated
from a massive explosion.\f
Similarly, Sinnoh is thought to have
been formed by an explosion in\r
ancient times.\f
Needless to say, the explosion came
from the power of a Pokémon.\f
The Pokémon must have been the
mythical creature considered\r
a deity by the ancients.\f
Our aim is not to capture the
mythical Pokémon, but to obtain its\r
power...\f
The PC entry ends there...\f
DP.264.0012:
The mythical Pokémon...\f
According to myths, the Pokémon
created Sinnoh with its power.\f
However, capturing the Pokémon with
a Poké Ball prevents it from using\r
its full power...\f
But with the Red Chain, the Pokémon
can be shackled, and its power can\r
be used without restraint...\f
The PC entry ends there...\f
DP.264.0013:
The Red Chain...\f
The Pokémon of the three lakes and
Mt. Coronet are somehow connected.\f
Capturing the Pokémon of the lakes
will free the Pokémon of Mt. Coronet.\f
From the Pokémon of the lakes,
crystals can be extracted to create\r
a Red Chain.\f
Using that Red Chain, the mythical
Pokémon can be summoned and shackled\r
to do as we command...\f
The PC entry ends there...\f
